stepTitle: Consider the piecewise function $$f(x)=\begin{cases}1,&x<3\\-1,&x>3\end{cases}$$. $$If$$ $$you$$ $$graph$$ $$it$$, $$it$$ $$looks$$ $$like$$ $$a$$ $$horizontal$$ $$ray$$ $$at$$ $$y=1$$ to the left of $$x=3$$ and a horizontal ray at $$y=-1$$ to the right of $$x=3$$. $$What$$ $$is$$ $$\lim_{x\to $$3$$} $$f(x)$$?
